package rulecoverage

func PositiveSendAfterLocalCloseRisk() string {
    ruleID := "send_after_local_close_risk"
    family := "idioms"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "A locally owned channel is closed and later used in a send expression."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
